'''jamate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kinematographically|kinematographically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-m-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kinematographically|kinematographically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jamate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jamate|jamate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jamatesher|jamatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jamatesherĂ«m|jamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jamatero|jamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jamateshĂ«|jamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jamateshĂ«m|jamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijamatero|gokijamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijamateshĂ«|gokijamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijamateshĂ«m|gokijamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojamankerom|gojamankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojamankeshĂ«|gojamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojamankeshĂ«m|gojamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojamankeya|gojamankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jamaterom|jamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jamatemu|jamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jamateya|jamateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijamaterom|gokijamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijamatemu|gokijamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijamateya|gokijamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jamamate|jamamate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jamamatesher|jamamatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jamamatesherĂ«m|jamamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jamamatero|jamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jamamateshĂ«|jamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jamamateshĂ«m|jamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijamamatero|gokijamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijamamateshĂ«|gokijamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijamamateshĂ«m|gokijamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojamamankerom|gojamamankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojamamankeshĂ«|gojamamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojamamankeshĂ«m|gojamamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojamamankeya|gojamamankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jamamaterom|jamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jamamatemu|jamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jamamateya|jamamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijamamaterom|gokijamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijamamatemu|gokijamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijamamateya|gokijamamateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠmĂŠte|jĂŠmĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠmĂŠtesher|jĂŠmĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠmĂŠtero|jĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠmĂŠtero|gokijĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠmĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠmĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠmĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠmĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠmĂŠterom|jĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠmĂŠtemu|jĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠmĂŠteya|jĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠmĂŠterom|gokijĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠmĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠmĂŠteya|gokijĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafmafte|jafmafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafmaftesher|jafmaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafmaftesherĂ«m|jafmaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafmaftero|jafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafmafteshĂ«|jafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafmafteshĂ«m|jafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafmaftero|gokijafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafmafteshĂ«|gokijafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafmafteshĂ«m|gokijafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafmafnkerom|gojafmafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafmafnkeshĂ«|gojafmafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafmafnkeshĂ«m|gojafmafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafmafnkeya|gojafmafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafmafterom|jafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafmaftemu|jafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafmafteya|jafmafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafmafterom|gokijafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafmaftemu|gokijafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafmafteya|gokijafmafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
